Findings.Title: Workflow consumed 8.2 GB-hours of Linux runners last 30 days
Findings.Detail: Workflow ci.yml is the top spender at 8.2 GB-hours; consider matrix pruning.
Findings.Remediation: Split jobs and add path filters to reduce runner minutes.

Findings.Title: Workflow runs on macOS runners (10x cost multiplier)
Findings.Detail: Workflow release.yml triggers macOS-latest weekly with no clear platform-specific need.
Findings.Remediation: Move to ubuntu-latest unless macOS is required.
